wisdoms.ar: «إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى»
wisdoms.en: "Actions are judged by motives, and each person will receive rewards according to his intentions."

wisdoms.ar: «الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ»
wisdoms.en: "A true Muslim is the one from whose tongue and hands other Muslims are safe."

wisdoms.ar: «لاَ يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ»
wisdoms.en: "None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself."

wisdoms.ar: «مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ»
wisdoms.en: "He who believes in Allah and the Last Day must either speak good or remain silent."

wisdoms.ar: «اتَّقِ اللَّهَ حَيْثُمَا كُنْتَ، وَأَتْبِعِ السَّيِّئَةَ الْحَسَنَةَ تَمْحُهَا»
wisdoms.en: "Fear Allah wherever you are, and follow up an evil deed with a good one to wipe it out."
"A good word is charity."

wisdoms.ar: «إن الله لا ينظر إلى صوركم وأموالكم، ولكن ينظر إلى قلوبكم وأعمالكم»
wisdoms.en: "Allah does not look towards your forms and your wealth, but He looks at your hearts and your deeds."
"The best among you are those who learn the Quran and teach it."

wisdoms.ar: «من سلك طريقاً يلتمس فيه علماً، سهل الله له به طريقاً إلى الجنة»
wisdoms.en: "Whoever treads a path seeking knowledge, Allah will make easy for him the path to Paradise."

wisdoms.ar: «عجباً لأمر المؤمن إن أمره كله خير، وليس ذاك لأحد إلا للمؤمن»
wisdoms.en: "Amazing is the affair of the believer, for his entire affair is good, and this is for no one except the believer."
"The world is a prison for the believer and a paradise for the disbeliever."
"Protect yourself from the Fire, even if with half a date."

wisdoms.ar: «إن الله يحب إذا عمل أحدكم عملاً أن يتقنه»
wisdoms.en: "Allah loves that when one of you does a job, he perfects it."
"Seek help from Allah and do not be helpless."

wisdoms.ar: «من كان يؤمن بالله واليوم الآخر فليكرم ضيفه»
wisdoms.en: "Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him honor his guest."

wisdoms.ar: «ليس الشديد بالصُّرَعَة، إنما الشديد الذي يملك نفسه عند الغضب»
wisdoms.en: "The strong is not the one who overcomes people by his strength, but the strong is the one who controls himself while in anger."
"Your smiling in the face of your brother is charity for you."
"The lawful is clear and the unlawful is clear."
"Do not belittle any good deed."

wisdoms.ar: «من حسن إسلام المرء تركه ما لا يعنيه»
wisdoms.en: "Part of a person's good Islam is leaving alone that which does not concern him."
"Whoever does not show mercy will not be shown mercy."
"Righteousness is good character."
"Maintain ties with those who sever them with you."
"The most beloved of people to Allah are those who are most beneficial to people."
"The religion is sincerity."
